name: send_sms
description: Send an SMS message from a VoIP.ms DID to a destination phone number. Use this when you need to send a text message through your VoIP.ms account. For retrieving messages, use get_sms instead.

name: get_sms
description: Retrieve SMS messages from the VoIP.ms API for a recent date range. Use this when you need to fetch incoming or recent messages. For sending messages, use send_sms instead.

did.description: Filter by a specific source VoIP.ms phone number (optional)

days.description: Number of days back to fetch messages (default: 1)
